messages.content:
a professor ask me to send him a proposal. do you think this email is a good response? pls improve it whereever is needed. "Dear Hassan
I hope you are well. I have prepared a proposal, as you suggested related to financial economics. As I concern about environmental issues, I have found carbon emission areas interesting. Furthermore, I worked as a copper market analyst and I am familiar with mining industry. Do you agree with this proposal. I will change the subject based on your advice.
Sincerely,
mansoureh  
"

Dear Professor Hassan,

I hope this email finds you well. Following our conversation, I have taken the liberty of preparing a proposal related to the field of financial economics, specifically focusing on carbon emission areas. Given my keen interest in environmental issues, I believe this topic would be both insightful and timely.

In addition to my passion for environmental concerns, I would like to highlight my previous experience as a copper market analyst, which has afforded me a comprehensive understanding of the mining industry. This knowledge will undoubtedly add value to the proposed research.

I kindly request your feedback and guidance on whether this proposed topic aligns with your expectations and the objectives of the research. Should you think it necessary, I am more than willing to modify or adapt the subject of the proposal to better suit your preferences.

Thank you for your consideration and valuable input.

Warm regards,
Mansoureh
i want it more frindly and also start with greeting ...

Hello Professor Hassan,

I hope this email finds you in good health. I wanted to follow up on our conversation and let you know that I have prepared a proposal, as you suggested, pertaining to the fascinating field of financial economics. Given my deep concern for environmental issues, I have chosen to focus on exploring carbon emission areas, which I find incredibly intriguing.

Furthermore, I wanted to bring to your attention my professional background as a copper market analyst, which has provided me with a solid understanding of the mining industry. I believe this knowledge will prove beneficial in the context of our research.

I greatly value your expertise and would truly appreciate your feedback and guidance on whether this proposed topic aligns with your expectations and research objectives. If you feel it necessary, I am more than willing to make any adjustments to the subject based on your advice and recommendations.

Thank you so much for taking the time to consider my proposal and for your valuable input. I eagerly await your response.

Warmest regards,
Mansoureh
change "this email finds you"....use simple words and structures

Dear Professor Hassan,

I hope you're doing well. I wanted to share that I've prepared a proposal, as you suggested, on the topic of financial economics. Since I'm passionate about environmental issues, I thought it would be interesting to explore carbon emission areas. Additionally, my experience as a copper market analyst has given me insights into the mining industry.

I would greatly appreciate your thoughts on this proposal. If you have any suggestions or would prefer a different topic, I am more than happy to make any necessary changes based on your advice.

Thank you for considering my proposal. I look forward to hearing your feedback.

Best regards,
Mansoureh

i want to email a professor for applying for phd he recently said me about the chance of his retirement which maybe a difficulty in this journey. this is my new email, pls improve it whenever is necessary. use simple words and structure. "Dear Wade,
I hope you are doing well. In my last email, I did a mistake and mentioned you my advisor, it was a typing mistake and I apologize about that.
I also asked you about a possibility for a joint professorship in case of your decision for retirement. I was thinking maybe there would be another option, I can finish my study sooner than usual. Do you think is it possible? If I start now, until fall 2024, I have time for a year, therefore I can study sooner. Recently, I have enrolled two courses in courser: "econometrics: methods and applications, Erasmus University Rotterdam" and "Machine Learning Specialization, Deeplearning.AI". I will start the courses soon. I will follow more courses under your advice. 
Please let me know if you have any suggestion. I am ready for all. 
Best regards,
Mansoureh
"

Dear Wade,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to address a mistake I made in my previous email, where I mistakenly referred to you as my advisor. I apologize for any confusion caused by this typographical error.

I also wanted to discuss the possibility of a joint professorship in the event that you decide to retire. While I understand that this could present a challenge, I wanted to propose an alternative solution. What if I were to expedite my studies and complete my PhD sooner than the usual timeframe? If I were to begin now, I would have approximately one year until fall 2024 to accomplish this goal. 

To further enhance my academic profile, I have recently enrolled in two courses on Coursera: "Econometrics: Methods and Applications" from Erasmus University Rotterdam, and "Machine Learning Specialization" from Deeplearning.AI. I plan to start these courses soon, and I am open to your recommendations on additional courses to pursue. 

I would greatly appreciate any suggestions or advice you may have regarding this matter. I am fully committed and prepared to explore all possible options.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
Mansoureh

Dear Wade,
I hope you are doing well. I wanted to address a mistake I made in my previous email, where I mistakenly referred to you as my advisor. I apologize for any confusion caused by this typographical error. 

In may last email, I asked the possibility of a joint professorship in the event that you decide to retire. While I understand that this could present a challenge, I wanted to propose an alternative solution. What if I were to expedite my studies and complete my PhD sooner than the usual timeframe?  If I were to begin now, I would have approximately one year until fall 2024 to accomplish this goal.

To further enhance my academic profile, I have recently enrolled in two courses on Coursera: “Econometrics: Methods and Applications” from Erasmus University Rotterdam, and “Machine Learning Specialization” from Deeplearning.AI. I plan to start these courses soon, and I am open to your recommendations on additional courses to pursue, that may help to finish phd sooner.

I would greatly appreciate any suggestions or advice you may have regarding this matter. I am fully committed and prepared to explore all possible options.
Thank you for your time and consideration.
Best regards,
Mansoureh

Dear Wade,

I hope this email finds you in good health. I wanted to address a mistake I made in my previous email where I accidentally referred to you as my advisor. I apologize for any confusion caused by this oversight.

In my previous email, I mentioned the possibility of a joint professorship should you decide to retire. While I understand that this may pose some challenges, I want to propose an alternative idea. What if I were to expedite my studies and complete my PhD ahead of the usual timeframe? If I were to begin now, I would have approximately one year until fall 2024 to achieve this goal.

To further enhance my academic profile, I have recently enrolled in two courses on Coursera: "Econometrics: Methods and Applications" from Erasmus University Rotterdam and "Machine Learning Specialization" from Deeplearning.AI. I plan to commence these courses soon and would greatly appreciate your recommendations on any additional courses that may assist me in completing my PhD at an accelerated pace.

I value your expertise and would greatly appreciate any suggestions or advice you may have regarding this matter. Please know that I am fully committed and prepared to explore all possible options.

Thank you for taking the time to consider my request. I eagerly await your response.

Best regards,
Mansoureh
is it wrong to say i hope you are doing well

No, it is not wrong to say "I hope you are doing well." It is a common and polite way to inquire about someone's well-being. However, if you prefer a different phrase or would like to vary your greeting, you can consider alternative phrases such as "I hope this email finds you in good health" or "I hope you are having a great day." Ultimately, it's important to use a greeting that feels natural and sincere to you.

In my previous email, I mentioned the possibility of a joint professorship should you decide to retire. While I understand that this may pose some challenges, I want to propose an alternative idea. What if I were to expedite my studies and complete my PhD ahead of the usual timeframe? If I were to begin now, I would have approximately one year until fall 2024 to achieve this goal. use simple structure and grammar pls

Dear Wade,

I hope you're doing well. I wanted to discuss the possibility of a joint professorship if you decide to retire. However, I understand there may be challenges involved. So, I have another idea to propose. What if I expedited my studies and completed my PhD earlier than usual? If I were to start now, I would have about a year until fall 2024 to accomplish this goal.

To strengthen my academic profile, I recently enrolled in two courses on Coursera: "Econometrics: Methods and Applications" from Erasmus University Rotterdam and "Machine Learning Specialization" from Deeplearning.AI. Soon, I plan to begin these courses and I would appreciate any additional recommendations you may have that could potentially help me finish my PhD sooner.

I would greatly appreciate any advice or suggestions you may have regarding this matter. I am fully committed and prepared to explore all possible options.

Thank you for taking the time to consider my request. I look forward to your response.

Best regards,
Mansoureh

What if I were to expedite my studies and complete my PhD ahead of the usual timeframe?
